text.title: rag-eval-strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for rag-eval-strategy application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there a production target requiring a shared eval definition?

branch.conclusion: Write the full strategy with numeric gates.
Minimal version: gates + owner + revisit; skip per-PR tier.
Skip strategy doc; rely on ad-hoc eval.

example.description: 3-person team launching to production → full strategy with PR / release / weekly tiers.
